# Support — icodeforyou_flutter

## Getting Help
Use GitHub Issues for:
- bugs
- feature requests
- documentation gaps
- CI/CD problems

## Not Supported
We do not provide support for:
- experimental code in `/programs/*`
- broken tests in `/programs/*`
- custom forks or modified Melos setups

## Before Requesting Support
Please:
- search existing issues
- include reproduction steps
- specify affected packages/plugins
- attach logs if relevant

## Maintainer Response
Maintainers will:
- triage issues
- request clarification if needed
- prioritize stable packages/plugins
